ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property sale */,
  "nta_code" TEXT /* Neighborhood Tabulation Area code */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "property_count" INTEGER /* Number of properties sold */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale occurred */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent involved in the sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property involved in the sale */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., condo, apartment, house) */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "square_footage" REAL /* Square footage of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "sale_status" TEXT /* Status of the sale (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_nta_code FOREIGN KEY ("nta_code") REFERENCES nta ("nta_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nta" (
  "nta_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each Neighborhood Tabulation Area */,
  "nta_name" TEXT /* Name of the Neighborhood Tabulation Area */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough where the NTA is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the NTA */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the NTA */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average household size in the NTA */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the population in the NTA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nta_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nta_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the borough */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average household size in the borough */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the population in the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real estate agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough where the agent operates */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Address of the agent's office */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in real estate */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., commercial, residential) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale involving the property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., condo, apartment, house) */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "square_footage" REAL /* Square footage of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_sold_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was last sold */,
  "last_sold_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was last sold */,
  "zoning" TEXT /* Zoning classification of the property */,
  "tax_assessment" REAL /* Tax assessment value of the property */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend record */,
  "nta_code" TEXT /* Reference to the Neighborhood Tabulation Area */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average sale price for the period */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the trend data */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., condo, apartment, house) */,
  "median_price" REAL /* Median sale price for the period */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Number of sales in the period */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Number of properties on the market */,
  "days_on_market" INTEGER /* Average number of days properties stay on the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_nta_code FOREIGN KEY ("nta_code") REFERENCES nta ("nta_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., market trend, sales analysis) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "nta_code" TEXT /* Reference to the Neighborhood Tabulation Area */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted sale price */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model used */,
  "predictive_factors" TEXT /* Factors considered in the prediction */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  "forecast_period" TEXT /* Period for which the prediction is made (e.g., next quarter, next year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_nta_code FOREIGN KEY ("nta_code") REFERENCES nta ("nta_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale being validated */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the validation */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the validation process */,
  "validation_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validated_by FOREIGN KEY ("validated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the permission is granted to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view sales data, generate reports) */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who granted the permission */,
  "grant_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was granted */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource to which the permission applies (e.g., sales data, reports) */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_granted_by FOREIGN KEY ("granted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary user in the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collaborator user */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project they are collaborating on */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Progress of the collaboration (e.g., 0% to 100%) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
